painPoints.headline: Scaling in Mexico shouldn't be this hard
painPoints.transition: That's why we built a single point of contact for your entire fulfillment operation in Mexico.

items.title: You have no eyes or hands in Mexico
items.description: Your team is in Buenos Aires, Madrid, or Miami. When something gets stuck at customs, when a customer complains, or when Amazon changes a requirement, there's no one on the ground to fix it. Every mistake costs you days and revenue.

items.title: Customs & NOMs slow you down
items.description: Permits, tariff codes, NOMs, and regulations that change without warning. One paperwork error and your shipment sits for weeks. Without local contacts, every import is a gamble.

items.title: You sell on 6 channels and each one is its own world
items.description: TikTok Shop, Mercado Libre, Amazon, Liverpool, Shopify, Temu. Each platform with its own SLA, labeling, integration, and rules that change without warning. Keeping them in sync is a full-time job.

items.title: Last-mile in Mexico is chaos
items.description: Dozens of regional carriers, each with different coverage, rates, and delivery times. Coordinating, comparing, and reacting to delivery issues doesn't scale with a team of 2.

steps.title: Import
steps.description: We handle customs clearance, duties, tariff classification, and regulatory compliance so your products enter Mexico without delays.

steps.title: Warehouse
steps.description: Your inventory is stored in our strategically located Guadalajara facility with real-time visibility and climate-controlled zones.

steps.title: Fulfill
steps.description: Orders are picked, packed, and labeled according to marketplace and channel specifications — accurately and on time, every time.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.description: We manage carrier selection, rate optimization, and last-mile logistics across Mexico through our multi-carrier network.

steps.title: Returns
steps.description: Our returns management system processes, inspects, and restocks returned items — keeping your customers satisfied and your inventory moving.

items.title: We adapt to your operation
items.description: Seasonal spikes, flash sales, new SKUs. Our operation flexes to your pace. No rigid contracts, no one-size-fits-all processes.

items.title: Mexico expertise, global standards
items.description: We know customs, NOMs, Mexican marketplaces, and local regulations inside out. With the operational rigor international brands demand.

items.title: Technology that connects everything
items.description: Integration with Shopify, Amazon, WooCommerce, TikTok Shop, and more. One view of your entire supply chain in real time.

items.title: Real customer service
items.description: Someone always answers. A dedicated team that knows your operation — not a bot or a lost ticket.

items.quote: Ecommex took us from zero to fully operational in Mexico within five weeks. Their customs expertise alone saved us months of trial and error.
items.name: Sarah Chen

items.quote: We evaluated three fulfillment partners in Mexico. Ecommex was the only one that could handle our SKU complexity and integrate directly with our Shopify Plus store.
items.name: Marcus Webb

items.quote: Our order accuracy went from 94% with our previous provider to 99.8% with Ecommex. The difference shows up directly in our customer reviews and repeat purchase rate.
items.name: Diana Robles

cta.headline: You focus on growing, we handle the rest
cta.subtext: Get a custom fulfillment plan built for your brand, your products, and your growth targets. No commitment required.

contact.headline: Reach us directly
contact.subtext: Prefer a quick chat? Message us on WhatsApp or give us a call.

hero.headline: Why Mexico Is Your Next Growth Market
hero.subtext: Latin America's second-largest economy is experiencing an e-commerce boom. International brands that move now will capture outsized returns.

stats.label: Largest e-commerce market in the Americas
stats.description: Mexico ranks behind only the U.S., Canada, and Brazil in total e-commerce revenue, with rapid momentum closing the gap.

stats.label: Internet penetration
stats.description: Over 95 million Mexicans are online, and digital adoption is accelerating across all age groups and income levels.

stats.label: Online buyers
stats.description: Mexico's digital consumer base has more than doubled in five years, creating massive demand for international products.

stats.label: Year-over-year e-commerce growth
stats.description: Mexican e-commerce is growing at more than 25% annually — far outpacing mature markets in North America and Europe.

stats.label: Faster online spend growth vs. offline retail
stats.description: Consumer spending is shifting decisively to digital channels, and the brands that show up first will build lasting market share.

items.title: Complex customs regulations
items.description: Mexico's import rules require specific certifications, labeling standards, and tariff classifications that vary by product category.

items.title: Fragmented logistics infrastructure
items.description: No single carrier covers all of Mexico reliably. Effective nationwide delivery requires a multi-carrier strategy and local partnerships.

items.title: Tax compliance requirements
items.description: Mexico's tax authority (SAT) enforces strict invoicing requirements, including CFDI electronic invoices for every transaction.

items.title: Marketplace-specific requirements
items.description: Mercado Libre, Amazon Mexico, and local platforms each have unique seller requirements, fulfillment standards, and performance metrics.

items.title: Consumer expectations are evolving
items.description: Mexican consumers increasingly expect fast delivery, easy returns, and high-quality packaging — the bar is rising quickly.

items.title: Language and cultural nuances
items.description: Product descriptions, customer service, and marketing must resonate locally. Direct translation from English is not enough.

items.solution: Our in-house customs brokerage team manages tariff classification, permits, certifications, and clearance — end to end.
We maintain relationships with 10+ carriers and dynamically route shipments based on destination, size, and cost to ensure reliable nationwide coverage.
Our systems generate compliant CFDI invoices automatically for every order, keeping you on the right side of SAT requirements.
We handle labeling, packaging, and fulfillment to each marketplace's exact specifications so your account stays in good standing.
Same-day processing, branded packaging options, and a streamlined returns process help you deliver the experience Mexican consumers demand.
Our bilingual team supports your customer communications and ensures your product listings are localized, not just translated.

whyEcommex.headline: Why Ecommex
whyEcommex.subhead: It is not just space. It is operations.

items.title: Grow without switching warehouses
items.description: 12,000+ positions available in GDL. When your seasonal peaks hit, the space is already there. No renegotiating or moving your operation.

items.title: Know exactly where every SKU is
items.description: Real-time access to your inventory via portal. Weekly cycle counts so your system always matches the physical. Zero surprises in peak season.

items.title: Pick the location that suits you best
items.description: We operate across multiple zones in Guadalajara so your operation stays close to where you need it.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.subhead: What clients ask us most before getting started

items.question: What is the minimum space I need to get started?
items.answer: We work with operations of all sizes — from clients with a single pallet to over 1,000. There is no minimum that leaves you out.

items.question: Can you store any type of product?
items.answer: Yes, with the exception of explosives and highly toxic materials. We handle everything else.

items.question: How do I get visibility of my inventory?
items.answer: You get access to an OMS portal where you can see your full operation in real time — stock, movements and orders.

items.question: What if my volume suddenly grows?
items.answer: We have the infrastructure to grow with you. You can scale without changing partners or renegotiating from scratch.

items.question: How does receiving work?
items.answer: We design the receiving process around your needs, on top of our standard SOPs. The goal is for it to work for both of us.

items.question: Can I have inventory in more than one location within Ecommex?
items.answer: Yes, no problem.

whyEcommex.subhead: It is not just freight. It is certainty.

items.title: NOM is not optional
items.description: Specialists in Mexican Official Standards. We catch classification problems before they stop your cargo at customs.

items.title: You know where your cargo is

pullquote.text: We used to lose 2 weeks at customs due to classification errors. With Ecommex we have not had a single delay in 8 months.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.subhead: What importers ask before getting started

items.question: Do you handle imports from any country?
items.answer: Yes, we import from Asia, Europe, the US and Latin America. If your supplier is elsewhere, we evaluate case by case.

items.question: What if my product needs a specific NOM?
items.answer: We have specialists in Mexican Official Standards. We validate classification and certifications before shipping to avoid holds.

items.question: Do you have your own customs broker?
items.answer: We work with certified customs brokers we have partnered with for years. Your cargo is always handled by the same team, not a call center.

items.question: How do you handle tariffs and VAT?
items.answer: We give you a projected calculation before shipping and pay them on your behalf for reimbursement. Zero surprises in the final invoice.

items.question: What if my product is damaged in transit?
items.answer: Insurance coverage from origin to our warehouse. We handle the claim for you.

items.question: Can you coordinate with my supplier in another language?
items.answer: Yes. Communication in English, Spanish and Mandarin as needed.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.subhead: What founders ask before starting fulfillment

items.question: How many orders per month do you handle?
items.answer: We process 50,000+ orders monthly for our current client base. We handle peak seasons (Buen Fin, Hot Sale) without degrading SLA.

items.question: Do you integrate with my marketplace or ecommerce?
items.answer: Yes. Native integrations with Shopify, Mercado Libre, Amazon, WooCommerce and more. If you use a custom system, we integrate via API.

items.question: What is the real ship-out SLA?
items.answer: Orders received before 14:00 ship same day. After cutoff, ship next day. No seasonal exceptions.

items.question: Do you handle custom packaging?
items.answer: Yes. We work with your materials (boxes, inserts, fillers) or help you design them. Your brand, your unboxing.

items.question: What if there is an error in an order?
items.answer: We cover the product refund and reshipping costs. But with 99.9% accuracy, errors are less than 0.1% of volume.

items.question: Can you do kitting or bundles?
items.answer: Yes. Promo bundles, gift kits, seasonal combos. No hidden fees per composite SKU.

items.title: Best rate per route
items.description: Aggregated volume gives us rates no individual client can negotiate. We pass the savings directly to you.

items.title: Your customer knows where their order is
items.description: Auto SMS and email notifications. Your customer does not call support, they already know.

pullquote.text: We used to have 4 contracts with 4 carriers. Now I have one contact and better rates than I could negotiate myself.
pullquote.name: Andrea Mendez

items.question: Which carriers do you handle?
items.answer: Estafeta, DHL, FedEx, Paquete Express and regional couriers. We choose the best per destination, not by exclusive contract.

items.question: What is the average delivery time?
items.answer: GDL metro: 24h. Major cities: 24-48h. Remote areas: 3-5 days. We give you specific SLA per destination at quoting.

items.question: Do you cover rural areas?
items.answer: Yes. We combine national carriers with regional couriers to reach localities that the big ones do not.

items.question: Do you handle COD (cash on delivery)?
items.answer: Yes, for markets that still need it. We settle collections with you weekly.

items.question: How does tracking work?
items.answer: One tracking number for your customer regardless of the final carrier. Auto notifications at each milestone.

items.question: What if a shipment is lost or damaged?
items.answer: Insurance coverage included. We handle the claim with the carrier and reimburse you.

hero.headline: Reverse logistics that recovers your margin
hero.subheadline: We receive, inspect and reintegrate your returned merchandise in 48h. Returns stop being a loss and become available inventory.

whatsIncluded.headline: What our returns management covers
whatsIncluded.subhead: Your margin does not vanish just because the customer changed their mind.

items.title: Centralized receiving
items.description: Your customers return to a single address. We receive them for you.

items.title: Inspection per SKU
items.description: Every return is checked against criteria you define. Nothing passes without verification.

items.title: Fast reintegration
items.description: 48h average from return to inventory available to sell again.

items.title: Refurbishment when applicable
items.description: Minor-damage product is restored for sale as B-stock with your authorization.

items.title: Scrap disposition
items.description: Non-recoverable merchandise is disposed of with documentation. Zero tax liability.

items.title: Detailed reporting
items.description: Dashboard with return reasons, SKU rates and patterns to improve your product.

steps.title: Return receipt
steps.description: Arrival at returns dock, immediate registration in the system.

steps.title: Identification
steps.description: Match against original order. Customer tracking, reason and date.

steps.title: Inspection
steps.description: Visual and functional review per your criteria. Photo evidence.

steps.title: Disposition
steps.description: Reintegrate, refurbish or dispose. Decided by rules you define.

steps.title: Closure
steps.description: Inventory updated, customer notified, refund authorized if applicable.

whyEcommex.headline: Why manage returns with Ecommex
whyEcommex.subhead: Returns are not the end of the sale. They are the start of retention.

items.title: 48h to inventory
items.description: Most 3PLs take 1-2 weeks to process returns. We take 48h. Your cash flow does not wait.

items.title: 85% goes back to selling
items.description: Rigorous inspection + refurbishment when applicable. Only 5% goes to scrap. The rest is recovered margin.

items.title: Data to improve your product
items.description: Reports with return reasons by SKU. You spot quality problems before they go viral.

pullquote.text: We went from a warehouse full of unprocessed returns to having all of them reintegrated in 48h. We recovered 18% more margin than before.
pullquote.name: Roberto Salinas

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.subhead: What brands ask about reverse logistics

items.question: How long does it take to process a return?
items.answer: 48h average from arrival to reintegrated in inventory or disposition decided. Peak seasons stay below 72h.

items.question: Who decides if a product is reintegrated or not?
items.answer: You define the criteria (physical condition, functionality, packaging) and we apply the rule. Borderline cases are referred to you.

items.question: Do you handle refurbishment?
items.answer: Yes. Minor-damage products can be restored for sale as B-stock or outlet, with your authorization per SKU.

items.question: How do you handle customer refunds?
items.answer: We notify you of the inspection decision. Your team (or automation) processes the refund from your system. We do not touch your payment gateway.

items.question: What happens with non-recoverable merchandise?
items.answer: Documented disposition (donation, recycling or disposal). We give you the certificate for your accounting.

items.question: Do I have visibility on returns in progress?
items.answer: Yes. Real-time dashboard with each return: status, reason, decision, date. Weekly email reports.

items.title: Warehousing

items.question: Which platforms do you integrate with?
items.answer: Shopify, Mercado Libre, Amazon, WooCommerce, VTEX, Magento and more. If you use something custom, we integrate via API.

items.question: How long is implementation?
items.answer: Standard integrations (Shopify, MELI): 1-2 weeks. Custom or multi-channel implementations: 3-4 weeks.

items.question: Do you have a public API?
items.answer: Yes. Full REST API with documentation, sandbox and tech support for your dev team.

items.question: What happens to my data if I leave the service?
items.answer: Your data is yours. We deliver a full export in CSV/JSON within 5 business days of request.

items.question: Do you have an uptime SLA?
items.answer: 99.9% contractual uptime. Cloud stack with redundancy. 2024 we had 23 minutes total downtime.

items.question: How do you handle data security?
items.answer: In-transit and at-rest encryption, mandatory 2FA, access auditing. Compliance with LFPDPPP (Mexican data law).

hero.headline: From First Call to First Delivery in Weeks
hero.subtext: A clear, structured onboarding process designed to get your products into the hands of Mexican consumers as quickly as possible.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.description: We learn about your products, sales channels, volume projections, and goals for the Mexican market. You ask us anything about logistics, customs, or compliance.

steps.title: Custom Proposal
steps.description: Within 48 hours, you receive a detailed proposal covering import strategy, fulfillment workflow, carrier recommendations, technology setup, and transparent pricing.

steps.title: Onboarding
steps.description: Our team configures your integrations, sets up your warehouse space, establishes your customs processes, and trains your team on our platform.

steps.title: Inventory Receiving
steps.description: Your first shipment arrives at our facility. We receive, inspect, catalog, and shelve every unit — then confirm inventory counts in your dashboard.

steps.title: Go Live
steps.description: Orders begin flowing from your sales channels to our warehouse. We pick, pack, and ship — you monitor everything in real time from your dashboard.

steps.title: Ongoing Optimization
steps.description: Monthly performance reviews, carrier mix adjustments, cost optimization recommendations, and strategic support as you scale in the Mexican market.

weeks.milestone: Go live and first orders shipped

items.question: Is there a minimum order volume to work with Ecommex?
items.answer: Our Growth tier starts at 1,000 orders per month. If you are below that volume but expect to scale quickly, we are happy to discuss a plan that grows with you.

items.question: Which e-commerce platforms and marketplaces do you integrate with?
items.answer: We integrate natively with Shopify, Shopify Plus, WooCommerce, Amazon Mexico, and Mercado Libre. We also offer a REST API for custom integrations with any ERP or order management system.

items.question: How do you handle imports and customs clearance?
items.answer: Our in-house customs brokerage team manages tariff classification, permits, certifications, labeling compliance, and clearance. We handle everything from your origin port to our warehouse door.

items.question: Which carriers do you use for delivery in Mexico?
items.answer: We work with 10+ carriers including Estafeta, FedEx Mexico, DHL, Redpack, and regional last-mile specialists. Our system automatically selects the best carrier for each shipment based on destination, speed, and cost.

items.question: How does returns management work?
items.answer: We provide a branded returns portal for your customers, manage return authorization and label generation, receive and inspect returned items, and restock or dispose of them based on your policies. You get full visibility through your dashboard.

items.question: How is pricing structured? Are there hidden fees?
items.answer: Pricing is volume-based and transparent. You pay for storage, pick-and-pack, and shipping — with no hidden fees, setup charges, or long-term commitments. We provide a detailed cost breakdown before you sign anything.

hero.headline: Fulfillment Built for Your Industry

items.title: Health & Supplements

items.pain: Fragile products, ingredient-based lot tracking, and the expectation of a premium unboxing experience require specialized handling at every step.

items.description: Lot and serial traceability, temperature-controlled zones, and priority shipping for medical devices and supplies.
items.pain: Mandatory traceability, temperature sensitivity, urgent delivery requirements, and zero tolerance for errors make medical fulfillment mission-critical.

items.description: Wrong sizes, change of mind, product that doesn't match the photo. Without a fast returns process, inventory stalls and you lose sales.

solutions.headline: How Ecommex solves it

items.question: How do you handle so many size and color variants?
items.answer: Our WMS is configured for multi-level variants (style > color > size). Each combination has its own SKU and pick location, eliminating errors and speeding up order preparation.

items.answer: Typical onboarding takes 1 to 2 weeks depending on SKU count. We configure your full catalog, integrate your sales channels, and run picking tests before go-live.

items.question: Can you handle seasonal peaks like Hot Sale or Buen Fin?
items.answer: Yes. Our operation scales on demand. We ramp up staff and picking capacity before each peak season so your orders ship same-day regardless of volume.

items.question: How does the returns process work?
items.answer: We receive the return, inspect based on your quality criteria, grade it (restock, second quality, or dispose), and process it in under 48 hours with real-time reports.

items.answer: Yes. From branded poly bags to premium boxes with tissue paper and thank-you cards. We configure your unboxing experience as a standard process.

items.title: Unboxing that doesn't reflect the brand
items.description: Your customer expects a premium experience when opening the box. Generic packaging with no inserts or personalization kills perceived value and repeat purchases.

solutions.headline: How Ecommex solves it
solutions.subhead: End-to-end operations built for beauty — from warehouse to the customer's door.

items.title: Handling protocols for fragile products
items.description: Packaging with protection materials specific to glass and cosmetics, dedicated pick & pack stations, and visual quality control before every shipment.

items.title: Lot and ingredient tracking
items.description: Every unit tracked by lot and manufacturing date, automatic rotation for products with limited shelf life, and real-time lot-level inventory reports.

items.title: Custom kitting and premium unboxing
items.description: Gift sets, free samples, branded inserts, and custom packaging. We create the unboxing experience your customers expect from a beauty brand.

items.title: Real-time multi-channel sync
items.description: Amazon MX, Mercado Libre, Shopify, and your DTC store synced from a single inventory pool. Zero overselling, zero cancellations.

faq.headline: Frequently asked questions
faq.subhead: What beauty brands ask us before getting started.

items.question: How do you protect fragile products during shipping?
items.answer: We use specialized packaging with bubble wrap, dividers, and reinforced boxes for glass and cosmetic products. Every order goes through a visual quality check before sealing.

items.question: Can you assemble custom kits and gift sets?
items.answer: Yes. We run custom kitting: gift sets, combos, free samples, branded inserts, and personalized packaging. You can change configurations by season or campaign.

items.question: Do you handle lot control for ingredients?
items.answer: Yes. Our WMS tracks every unit by lot and manufacturing date. We implement automatic rotation so products with the shortest shelf life ship first.

items.question: How long does onboarding take for a beauty brand?
items.answer: Typical onboarding takes 1 to 2 weeks. We configure your SKUs, lots, kitting rules, and channel integrations so you're operational fast.

items.question: Can I sell on Amazon MX and my Shopify store at the same time?
items.answer: Yes. We sync inventory in real time across Amazon MX, Mercado Libre, Shopify, and your DTC store. One inventory pool, zero risk of overselling.

items.question: What's the minimum volume to get started?
items.answer: There's no fixed minimum. We work with brands from 300 orders/month to 40,000+. The model adapts to your current volume and scales with you.

related.headline: Complementary services
related.subhead: Everything you need to operate your beauty brand in Mexico, under one roof.

items.title: Warehousing
items.description: Dedicated zones for cosmetics and skincare with temperature control and lot-level organization.

items.title: Fulfillment
items.description: Careful pick & pack with custom kitting and visual quality control for every order.

items.title: Shipping
items.description: Nationwide multi-carrier with protective packaging and 2-4 day delivery across Mexico.

items.title: Returns
items.description: Same-day return processing with quality inspection and automated restocking.

hero.headline: Brands That Chose Mexico — and Won
hero.subtext: Real results from international brands that partnered with Ecommex to enter and scale in the Mexican e-commerce market.

cases.title: U.S. Supplement Brand Enters Mexico in 4 Weeks
cases.challenge: A fast-growing U.S. supplement brand wanted to enter Mexico but faced complex COFEPRIS registration requirements, uncertain customs timelines, and no local logistics infrastructure.
cases.solution: Ecommex managed the full COFEPRIS registration process, set up customs clearance workflows for recurring shipments, and configured direct integrations with the brand's Shopify Plus store and Amazon Mexico seller account.
results: Live and shipping in Mexico within 4 weeks
10,000+ orders fulfilled in the first 90 days
32% lower per-unit fulfillment cost vs. cross-border shipping
cases.resultsNote: Results based on the first quarter of operations.

cases.title: European Beauty Brand Scales to 20K Orders/Month
cases.challenge: A European beauty brand was shipping cross-border to Mexico, resulting in 12-18 day delivery times, high customs duties paid by customers, and a 40% cart abandonment rate at checkout.
cases.solution: Ecommex established a bonded warehouse setup, managed product registration and Spanish-language labeling, and implemented a multi-carrier delivery strategy with 2-4 day nationwide coverage.
results: Delivery time reduced from 14 days to 3 days average
Scaled from 2,000 to 20,000 orders per month in 6 months
Customer satisfaction score increased from 3.8 to 4.7 out of 5
cases.resultsNote: Results measured over a 6-month period after go-live.

cases.title: Fashion Brand Conquers High Return Rates
cases.challenge: An international fashion brand expanding into Mexico struggled with a 30% return rate, slow return processing, and inventory that sat in limbo for weeks — hurting cash flow and customer experience.
cases.solution: Ecommex implemented a branded returns portal, same-day return processing and inspection, automated restocking workflows, and real-time return analytics integrated with the brand's OMS.
results: Return processing time reduced from 14 days to 24 hours
85% of returned items restocked and available for resale within 48 hours
Return rate decreased to 22% through better size guide integration
Net Promoter Score increased by 18 points
cases.resultsNote: Results measured over a 4-month period after implementation.

hero.headline: Transparent Pricing That Scales With You
hero.subtext: No setup fees, no hidden charges, no long-term contracts. Pay for what you use, and get more efficient as you grow.

philosophy.headline: How our pricing works
philosophy.description: We believe in simple, transparent pricing. Every plan includes access to our full technology platform, all integrations, and dedicated account management. You only pay for storage, fulfillment, and shipping — based on your actual volume.

tiers.name: Growth
tiers.description: For brands entering Mexico or scaling their initial presence. Full-service fulfillment with all the tools you need to establish your footprint.

tiers.name: Scale
tiers.description: For brands with proven demand in Mexico that need to optimize costs, improve delivery speed, and expand to new channels and marketplaces.

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.description: For high-volume brands that require custom SLAs, dedicated warehouse space, priority processing, and strategic supply chain consulting.
